Workshop.Title: ! RMR BETA BRANCH !
Workshop.Description:
A mode that treats LOR in a rogue-like manner, step by step, starting from Canard (Chapter 1). Start by clicking the icon on the top right corner of the Reception screen. When you want to pause your run, quit the game or go back to title and continue by clicking the bookmark icon also on the Reception screen.
ORIGINAL MOD BY ABCDCODE /// CURRENTLY ONLY AVAILABLE IN ENGLISH The mod is currently being developed by CalmMagma, Distopia and Alany; the REBORN version as it is called, adds new events, new receptions, new encounters, E.G.O. pages, several bugfixes, and a whole lot more.
